name: duration
description: Length of the connection in seconds

name: protocol_type
description: Type of protocol used

name: service
description: Network service on the destination

name: flag
description: Status of the connection

name: src_bytes
description: Number of data bytes from source to destination

name: dst_bytes
description: Number of data bytes from destination to source

name: land
description: 1 if connection is from/to the same host/port, 0 otherwise

name: wrong_fragment
description: Number of wrong fragments

name: urgent
description: Number of urgent packets

name: hot
description: Number of hot indicators (access to system files, creating executables)

name: num_failed_logins
description: Number of failed login attempts

name: logged_in
description: 1 if successfully logged in, 0 otherwise

name: num_compromised
description: Number of compromised conditions

name: root_shell
description: 1 if root shell is obtained, 0 otherwise

name: su_attempted
description: 1 if su root command attempted, 0 otherwise

name: num_root
description: Number of root accesses

name: num_file_creations
description: Number of file creation operations

name: num_shells
description: Number of shell prompts

name: num_access_files
description: Number of operations on access control files

name: num_outbound_cmds
description: Number of outbound commands in FTP session

name: is_host_login
description: 1 if login belongs to host list, 0 otherwise

name: is_guest_login
description: 1 if login is a guest login, 0 otherwise

name: count
description: Number of connections to the same host in past 2 seconds

name: srv_count
description: Number of connections to same service in past 2 seconds

name: serror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with SYN errors

name: srv_serror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with SYN errors for same service

name: rerror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with REJ errors

name: srv_rerror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with REJ errors for same service

name: same_srv_rate
description: Percentage of connections to same service

name: diff_srv_rate
description: Percentage of connections to different services

name: srv_diff_host_rate
description: Percentage of connections to different hosts for same service

name: dst_host_count
description: Number of connections to same destination host

name: dst_host_srv_count
description: Number of connections to same service on destination host

name: dst_host_same_srv_rate
description: Percentage of connections to same service on destination host

name: dst_host_diff_srv_rate
description: Percentage of connections to different services on destination host

name: dst_host_same_src_port_rate
description: Percentage of connections from same source port

name: dst_host_srv_diff_host_rate
description: Percentage of connections to service from different hosts

name: dst_host_serror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with SYN errors to destination host

name: dst_host_srv_serror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with SYN errors to service on destination host

name: dst_host_rerror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with REJ errors to destination host

name: dst_host_srv_rerror_rate
description: Percentage of connections with REJ errors to service on destination host

name: label
description: Attack type label

name: difficulty
description: Difficulty level of detection (0=easy, 1=hard)
